description: A dark, desaturated designed graphic over a dim photo of a crowded airport terminal. Text in the center reads 'STUCK IN LINE AT' with 'JFK AIRPORT?' in red, and below in large white italic capitals 'THANK A DEMOCRAT!'. A White House wordmark sits at the bottom.
notable_text: STUCK IN LINE AT JFK AIRPORT? THANK A DEMOCRAT!; THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON
